scripts.dev: concurrently -n php,vite "npm run dev:php" "npm run dev:vite"
scripts.dev:php: PORT=$(node src/utils/env.js PORT 8000) && echo "⚡ PHP on http://localhost:$PORT" && PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" php -S localhost:$PORT -t public public/router.php 2>/dev/null
scripts.start: APP_ENV=production PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" php -S 0.0.0.0:$(node src/utils/env.js PORT 8000) -t public public/router.php
